criteriaResults.evidence: ldl >365d old -> gap finding naming biomarker + interval 365; ldl ~178d within cadence -> 0 gap findings
biomarker absent from RECOMMENDED_CADENCE_DAYS -> 0 gap findings (no guessed cadence)

ldl=200 + triglycerides=400 both OOR -> single kind=question offer, evidence has both names, tags=['cross-marker','ldl','triglycerides']; llmSpy never called; no provider/network imports in detection files
runProactiveReview one offline pass -> trend + gap + offer findings (>=3 written, one kind=question with cross-marker tag)
digDeeper reads offer frontmatter, recovers pair, calls injected generateRecommendation spy once with question containing ldl+triglycerides
review --dig-deeper <id> option added; plain review prints counts incl gap+offer; try/catch->exitCode=1 never throws

filesChanged: src/medical/analysis/cadence.ts (created: CLOSED RECOMMENDED_CADENCE_DAYS + detectTestGaps pure zero-LLM, skips unknown)
src/medical/analysis/cross-marker.ts (created: CLOSED CROSS_MARKER_PAIRS + detectCrossMarkerPatterns pure zero-LLM, tags pair for dig-deeper)
src/medical/analysis/review-pass.ts (modified: extend findings to trend+gap+offer; DigDeeperDeps + digDeeper() delegating to generateRecommendation)
notes: Distinct ruleKeys avoid id collisions; sc-1-4 idempotency preserved (ldl seed ~178d within 365d cadence -> no gap fires for that seed). Only --dig-deeper crosses the LLM gate via imported generateRecommendation.
